identity.name: ZenGrade
identity.description: A grading interface designed for focus and clarity. It avoids the sterile 'LMS Blue' in favor of high-contrast typography, paper-like textures, and 'Brutalist-Light' components. The goal is to make grading feel like a precise, architectural process rather than a chore.
identity.visual_motif: Paper Layers, Sharp Edges, Monospace Data, Neon Accents

usage_rules: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use flat colors or subtle noise textures.
Primary color (Orange) is ONLY for the main 'Call to Action' (e.g., 'Grade Now', 'Submit').
Use 'Accent' (Yellow/Amber) for highlighting key data points or active states.
Borders are significant. Use `border-2` for cards to give a 'constructed' feel.
Dark mode is NOT just inverted. It's 'Deep Charcoal', not pure black.

cards.style: Sharp corners (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`), 2px solid border (`border-2 border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700`), flat white background.
cards.interaction: On hover: Translate up-left by 2px (`-translate-y-0.5 -translate-x-0.5`) and add a sharp shadow (`shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)]`).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all active:translate-x-[4px] active:translate-y-[4px] active:shadow-none border-2 border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 hover:text-black font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-stone-300 focus:border-black focus:ring-0 px-0 py-2 rounded-none placeholder:text-stone-400 font-mono text-sm transition-colors
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-500 mb-1 block

badges.style: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border border-current

layout.spacing: Use generous spacing. `gap-8` for grid items, `my-12` for section separation.
layout.dashboard_structure: Sidebar (collapsible, icon-only on mobile) + Main Content Area.
layout.grading_view: Split Screen: Left 50% (Document Viewer, sticky), Right 50% (Grading Panel, scrollable). On mobile: Stacked (Document on top, collapsible).

motion.philosophy: Micro-interactions only. No sweeping page transitions. Snap and precision.
motion.loading: Skeleton screens with a 'shimmer' effect (`animate-pulse` on stone-200 backgrounds).

assets.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width: 1.5px for a thin, precise look).

images.description: Abstract white wavy shapes for login page background
Abstract colorful paper shapes for empty dashboard state

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is at least 4.5:1 against background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (2px solid orange) on ALL interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `Manrope` and `JetBrains Mono` fonts via `index.css` imports.
Configure `tailwind.config.js` to extend the color palette with the 'stone' scale as the base neutral.
Update `index.css` with the custom CSS variables for light/dark mode.
Create a reusable `Card` component that enforces the sharp-corner/thick-border style.
For the 'Grading View', use a Resizable Panel layout (e.g., `react-resizable-panels`) if possible, or a simple flex/grid split.
Use `sonner` for toasts, styled to match the 'brutalist-light' theme (square, black border).
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'SaaS' gradients. Use flat colors and borders.
Don't center everything. Use asymmetry to create visual interest.
Use `Manrope` for all headings and `Inter` for body text.
Use `JetBrains Mono` for all data points (grades, roll numbers, IDs).
Ensure the 'Split View' for grading is responsive (stacks on mobile).
Add 'dark mode' support using the `dark:` prefix in Tailwind.
